filesCreated.purpose: Block metadata, attributes (anchor, heading, description, buttons), multiple: false, category: takt-theme-template
Block registration with icon and save utility
Editor component with AdvancedRichText for inline heading/description and ThemeButton for button array
PHP frontend template with @var docblock, theme_block_region_id() on h1, ThemeButton get_template_part per button
Block icon: centered layout with large heading rect, description lines, and two button rects

preExistingErrors: blocks/MainWrapper/index.tsx - multiple prettier/prettier and react-hooks/rules-of-hooks errors

syncStatus.notes: TSX and PHP produce identical HTML structure. shouldDisplay() controls editor empty state. Heading conditional, description conditional, and button group conditional are mirrored between TSX and PHP.

infoNotes: $buttons ?? [] redundant removed — block.json default guarantees value

variations: Heading Only - No Description, No Buttons

implementationNotes: Used AdvancedRichText directly for heading (h1) and description (p) per spec, rather than ThemeHeading composite
ThemeButton rendered per button in the array; button filtering (url or postId check) done in PHP with array_filter
multiple: false in block.json ensures only one instance can be added per page
theme_block_region_id() applied to h1 for accessibility landmark labeling
text-accent used for heading color as per DEC-002 decision (adapts to page color scheme)
text-header-0 used for heading typography as per DEC-001 decision (largest available heading utility)
